response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (30%) is above our minimum threshold (25%), and cascading failure conditions require preserving my 37% reserve to maintain microgrid stability; minimal 0.25 kW/tick transfers are already active to prevent total collapse.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.25, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Microgrid in cascading failure; r1c3 and r0c2 critically low >90min. r1c2 SoC=37% with ~1.5h runway. Minimal transfers (0.25 kW/tick) to nearest peer (r1c3) to prevent total collapse while preserving own survival margin. Generation recovery status unknown—assume offline..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
